examples: It's the sense of otherness, separateness.
She revelled in "a special state of separateness from everyone and everything".
In treating with a chip scan picture, adopt sub-picture segmentation and separateness disposal mode.
He insists that everybody must recognise the sovereign separateness of the Turkish part of it before any deal is possible.
Quite right: only by abandoning some of their separateness are Bradford's Pakistani Muslims likely to save their youngsters from a jobless future.
